name: sftpgo-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin for SFTPGo — the managed file transfer platform. REST API payloads, WebAdmin configuration, deployment recipes, Event Action template authoring, and OSS-vs-Enterprise awareness.

plugins.name: sftpgo-skill
plugins.description: AI-agent-agnostic reference skill for SFTPGo. Teaches the AI how to drive SFTPGo correctly: REST API payloads (tagged unions, secret envelope, required fields), WebAdmin forms, Go template authoring for Event Actions, deployment recipes (Docker, Kubernetes, env-var convention), SaaS conventions, and OSS-vs-Enterprise awareness.
